pi_items.source: verifier.py checks for target_sample of 441000 which corresponds to exactly 10.0 seconds given the 44100Hz sample rate.
verifier.py checks target_sample which is initialized via metadata or defaulting to 441000.
verifier.py checks pos against target_sample using this tolerance_samples parameter.
verifier.py calculates gain_5s at 5.0s and gain_15s at 15.0s.
verifier.py checks if reduction >= ducking_req_db, which defaults to 6.0.
export_result.sh EXPORT_PATH variable defines the expected export location.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for the Ardour Audio Description Ducking task. Verified that real-world audio recordings from Archive.org (Moonlight Sonata, Art of War) are used. Confirmed that the verifier correctly implements checks for the 10.0s (441000 sample) narration start, 22050 sample tolerance, 5.0s and 15.0s ducking check intervals, 6.0 dB minimum ducking reduction, and the required /home/ga/Audio/ife_mix/ad_mix.wav export path.
